{{Infobox character
| name = Estyr
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Read the truth, [[Intent]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Emperor's equal, [[Regent]]}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|, Regent of the North}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Ruler|ruler]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Darkness and Dawn (novel)|Of Darkness and Dawn]]
}}

''See also: [[Estyr Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Estyr is a powerful figure whose identity and status have evolved through various stages, including her origins as [[Estyr Fourteen]]. During her early [[life]], she belonged to a family that struggled with poverty and extreme cold in the high passes. She eventually ascended to the rank of [[Estyr Six]], a transition that brought her family safety, abundance, and status as her protectors. Throughout history, she has been regarded as a hero and savior, with some even suggesting she should rule as Estyr One, the supreme authority. As a combatant and leader, Estyr possesses immense power tied to her [[Intent]]. She can levitate unaided, fly, and manipulate objects or people with her mind. A signature aspect of her presence is a halo of spinning Hydra skulls that orbit her head. She has been known to wear black armor similar in design to [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s, often accompanied by a full-face helmet with a dark visor. Her abilities allow her to merge her pride and power with other creatures and exert an [[aura]] so intense it can overwhelm others. Historically, she has been a force of destruction, often choosing to lay waste to her enemies rather than using stealth. She has also been known to act as an executioner, making final judgments regarding souls and truths.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Estyr]] is a character who observes the sky.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c22">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|Regarded in myth and history as the equal of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], Estyr served as a [[Regent]] accompanied by three orbiting skulls. During combat, she demonstrated immense physical resilience and speed, utilizing seven spikes to attack and even launching a piece of wood at [[Baldezar Kern]] with bullet-like velocity. Her magical prowess allowed her to levitate [[Jorin]] and [[Loreli]], though she also made accusations that [[Calder]] and the speech-writers chose not to address. Following her death from wounds sustained in battle, she was memorialized by a massive bronze statue featuring skulls carved into its crown.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] is held up in myth and history as [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s equal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] is a [[Regent]] with three skulls orbiting her head.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] weathered a shoulder-tackle like a solid oak.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]]'s fists are extremely fast.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] possesses skulls that she seeks to reclaim.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] is the [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] launched a piece of wood at [[Baldezar Kern]] like a bullet.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] died from her wounds.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c9">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] has made accusations that [[Calder]] and the speech-writers agreed not to address directly.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c15">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] is dead.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] fights with seven spikes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] was levitating [[Jorin]] and [[Loreli]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Estyr]] uses spikes to attack.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|There is a bronze statue of [[Estyr]] that dwarfs the [[Lyathatan]] and has skulls carved into its crown.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c25">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Estyr is a [[Soulbound]] woman and one of the remaining [[Regents]] who serves as the [[Regent]] of the North. A tall figure with blonde hair and whirling skulls, she possesses three [[Vessels]] and the ability to [[Read]] the truth. During a battle at the top of the [[Rose Tower]] involving two [[Guild Heads]], her body was found mangled, burned, and scar-ravaged with a warped face. Although she has been unable to be restored to her right mind, she remains a powerful ruler who prioritizes combating the [[Elders]] over politics. Clad in jet-black armor resembling that of [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]], she attacked with an iron spike and used seven spikes of the [[Blackwatch]] to drive into an [[Elder]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] has three [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] possesses Hydra skulls even when practicing her art.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] was supposed to lead [[Shera]] and [[Bareius]] in.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is a woman who possesses [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is a [[Soulbound]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] has the ability to [[Read]] the truth.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] was involved in a battle at the top of the [[Rose Tower]] with two [[Guild Heads]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]]'s body left a hole in the room.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is a character who was found mangled and burned.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] has a warped face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c10">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|A small gray string gave off [[Estyr]]’s powerful, confident [[Intent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] wrote a journal containing mentions of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is a place people fight.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is a ruler who prioritizes combating the [[Elders]] over politics.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c13">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] accused [[Calder]] of being enthralled by [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] has a scar-ravaged body.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] accused the [[Steward]] of [[Elder]] worship.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] accused [[Calder Marten]] of selling his soul to [[Kelarac]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] refers to a past fight or event that [[Shera]]'s allies want to avoid repeating.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is one of the remaining [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is a person [[Loreli]] has talent comparable to.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c18" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is tall with blonde hair and skulls whirling around her head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] stated there was only one [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] proposed dividing the world into four parts.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] could have collapsed the foundations of the [[Capital]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] is the [[Regent]] of the North and has been unable to be restored to her right mind.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] prepared by unearthing a set of jet-black armor that resembled [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]’s.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] arrived and attacked with an iron spike.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c25" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] wears black armor and drives seven spikes of the [[Blackwatch]] into an [[Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c26">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 26</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]] lounged on the edge of a stone coffin.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Estyr]]'s power rolled the coffin lid over [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“For now, we’ll divide the world into four, as we have done before under the Emperor’s direction,” she continued.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
